response.justification: The candidate meets the minimum bar of 15+ years of software engineering experience and a technical bachelor's degree, and shows genuine breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, plus entrepreneurial initiative as a founder. However, the role is a director-level IC position centered on AI strategy, and the resume shows no advanced AI-related degree, no recognized AI expertise or AI-built products at scale, and no track record of advising executives or strategic customers. Recent MCP/agent-tooling work is promising but too shallow and too recent for a principal AI strategy role; the career trajectory tops out at senior/staff hands-on engineering.
strengths: 18+ years of hands-on engineering across diverse stacks, domains, and system scales
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform, demonstrating entrepreneurial drive and product ownership
Active knowledge-sharing through workshops, conference talks, and open-source libraries
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML depth or recognized AI expertise; agent-tooling exposure is recent and limited
No director/principal-level scope: career is senior/staff IC delivery, not org-wide technical strategy or executive advising
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no evidence of shipped AI-powered products or platforms

key_factors.factor: Missing AI strategy and recognized AI expertise
